title: CGPSC Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 46 Posts
department: Public Works Department (Civil); Public Works Department (Electrical/Mechanical); General Administration Department (Chief Technical Examiner - Vigilance)
short_info: The Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) Assistant Engineer, Gazetted – Second Class Notification 2026 has been released on 08 May 2026 on the official website www.psc.cg.gov.in. A total of 46 vacancies have been announced through the CGPSC State Engineering Service Exam 2026. Candidates aged 21–30 years (with relaxations up to 45 years for local residents and other reserved categories) who hold a Bachelor’s Degree (BE/B.Tech) in Civil, Mechanical, or Electrical Engineering, or AMIE Part A & B certificate equivalent, are eligible to apply for these Assistant Engineer vacancies. The o

application_fee.st_fee: Applicable to all candidates (non-refundable in all circumstances)
application_fee.details: Note: CG local residents who appear in the written examination/interview will receive examination fee refund directly to the bank account provided at time of application. Portal charges, GST, and service charges are non-refundable.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be minimum 21 years and not more than 30 years of age as on 01-01-2026. Chhattisgarh State local residents get an additional 5-year relaxation (maximum age 40 years) as per State Govt. order dated 18.01.2024, extended up to 31.12.2028. All age relaxations combined must not exceed 45 years.

qualification.required_degree: Bachelor's Degree (BE/B.Tech) in Civil / Mechanical / Electrical Engineering from a University incorporated/established by Act of Parliament or State Legislature, or UGC-recognized institution (Section 3 of UGC Act 1956)
qualification.domicile: Local/Original Resident Certificate of Chhattisgarh (mandatory for reserved category/age relaxation/fee concession benefits)
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (11-06-2026). All required educational qualification certificates must be obtained on or before the closing date of application; certificates issued after this date will not be accepted. | Educational Qualification

vacancy_details.Name of the post and department: Assistant Engineer (Civil) - General Administration Department (Chief Technical Examiner/Vigilance)

category_wise_vacancy.Name of the post and department: Assistant Engineer (Civil) - General Administration Department (Chief Technical Examiner/Vigilance)

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Level-12: Rs. 56,100-1,77,500/- + DA and other allowances as per State Govt. orders

selection_process: Paper Subject Type Questions Marks Duration
Paper I General Studies Objective MCQ 150 300 2:30 Hours
Paper II Engineering (Civil / Mechanical / Electrical - any one) Objective MCQ 150 300 2:30 Hours

syllabus.details: Paper I - General Studies (300 Marks, 150 Questions) | Paper II - Engineering (300 Marks, 150 Questions) - Choose any ONE | (01) Civil Engineering | (02) Mechanical Engineering | (03) Electrical Engineering

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official CGPSC portal www.psc.cg.gov.in. Manual or postal applications will not be accepted. The online portal will be active from 13-05-2026 (12:00 PM) to 11-06-2026 (11:59 PM).

First-time users must complete Candidate Registration (name, father's name, DOB, mobile, email, identity proof, live photo capture via mobile link, signature upload) before applying. Previously registered candidates can log in directly using their existing ID and password.
After successful fee payment, candidates will receive an application receipt. Status must show "Submitted" and payment status "Paid" - otherwise the application will be rejected.
Documents to be Submitted Before Interview (on being called):
important_instructions: Applications are accepted online only - no manual or postal applications. All required educational qualification certificates must be obtained on or before 11-06-2026. Free error correction is available once only from 12-06-2026 to 14-06-2026. Paid error correction (Rs. 500/-) is available once only from 15-06-2026 to 17-06-2026 - corrections allowed only in gender, DOB, category, domicile, disability and ex-serviceman entries. No further correction of any kind is permitted after the paid correction window. Portal fee and GST are non-refundable; examination fee is refunded to CG local residents who appear in examination. Admit cards/interview call letters will be uploaded approximately 10 days before exam/interview on the CGPSC website only - not sent individually. Candidates must carry original photo ID (Voter ID / Passport / Driving Licence / PAN Card / Aadhaar) along with admit card. Mobile phones and communication devices are strictly prohibited in examination/interview premises. Candidates found using unfair means, impersonation, or submitting fake documents will be debarred and face criminal prosecution. Candidates currently employed in Govt./PSU/Bank must apply for NOC from appointing authority before or immediately after submitting the online application. Candidates with more than one spouse living are not eligible for appointment. No re-evaluation or re-totalling of answer sheets is available. Candidates are advised to regularly visit www.psc.cg.gov.in for all updates and amendments.
